content.paragraph1: In a world of increasing surveillance and control, we stand for financial freedom and privacy.
content.paragraph2: Ergo is built on the core principles that drove the original crypto revolution: open, permissionless, secure systems that empower regular people.
content.paragraph3: We reject the centralization of power. We reject the surveillance state. We reject the corporate capture of our financial systems.
content.paragraph4: Ergo provides the tools for people to secure their financial interactions through contractual money - programmable, private, and unstoppable.
content.conclusion: This is not just technology. This is resistance.

corePillars.title: CORE PILLARS
corePillars.subtitle: Ergo combines proven principles with cutting-edge cryptography

security.title: SECURITY (POW)
security.description: ASIC-resistant Autolykos v2 PoW ensures robust decentralization, fair mining, and long-term security for everyone.

programmability.title: PROGRAMMABILITY (eUTXO + ERGOSCRIPT)
programmability.description: Formally verifiable, expressive, and secure contracts—powered by ErgoScript and the advanced eUTXO model.

sustainability.title: SUSTAINABILITY (STORAGE RENT)
sustainability.description: Storage rent and predictable costs maintain long-term network health and prevent blockchain bloat.

privacy.title: PRIVACY
privacy.description: Protocol-level privacy using Sigma protocols—enabling confidential dApps and transactions.

oraclePools.title: ORACLE POOLS
oraclePools.description: The first truly decentralized oracle pools—reliable, permissionless off-chain data access with built-in incentives.

devFriendly.title: DEV FRIENDLY
devFriendly.description: World-class docs, open tools, and a vibrant, collaborative community make building on Ergo easy and innovative.

whyErgo.title: WHY ERGO?
whyErgo.subtitle: A chain designed for agents to transact without identity, pre-funding, or permission

fairAndSecure.title: DETERMINISTIC COSTS
fairAndSecure.subtitle: eUTXO Advantage
fairAndSecure.description: Agents know the exact fee before submitting. No gas estimation failures, no surprise costs. The transaction executes as constructed — or not at all.

powerfulAndFlexible.title: PAYMENT IS THE CONTRACT
powerfulAndFlexible.subtitle: ErgoScript Acceptance Predicates
powerfulAndFlexible.description: Conditions are embedded in the payment itself. No escrow, no oracle, no trusted server. The payment encodes what must be true for redemption.

sustainable.title: ZERO GAS BOOTSTRAPPING
sustainable.subtitle: Babel Fees
sustainable.description: Agents pay fees in any token — not just ERG. Spin up, hand it a Note, it transacts immediately. No pre-funded wallet needed.

privacy.title: PROGRAMMABLE CREDIT
privacy.subtitle: Notes, Reserves, Trackers
privacy.description: Agents issue bearer IOUs backed by on-chain reserves. Anti-double-spend trackers ensure integrity. Local credit, global settlement.

community.title: NO KILL SWITCH
community.subtitle: Proof-of-Work Guarantee
community.description: No foundation multisig, no validator cartel, no emergency pause. No committee can freeze agent funds or halt the network.

developer.title: AGENT-READY SDK
developer.subtitle: Fleet SDK, MCP, LangChain
developer.description: TypeScript and Python SDKs with LangChain tools, MCP server for Claude, and 10 working examples — from basic payments to multi-agent orchestration.
